creator: konstantin.ashaev@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ben Woods from comment #1)
I've just installed a new version of remmina. Unfortunately, It crashed after I tried to rdp in VMs. I never did program debugging. How could I provide a backtrace with symbols?
I read through the section about debugging in the Handbook, but all I got using gdb was "no debugging symbols found" after run. Apparently, I missed something.
